diagrams.title: Template Instantiation Process
diagrams.description: Shows how templates are processed at compile time to generate specific code
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that template instantiation happens at compile time, not runtime

diagrams.title: Template Types Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Categorizes different types of template parameters in C++
elements: - Type Parameters: typename T, class T
- Non-type Parameters: int N, double* ptr
- Template Template Parameters: template<typename> class Alloc
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing what can be passed as template arguments

diagrams.title: Class Template with Member Functions
diagrams.description: Shows structure of a typical class template with its member functions defined outside
elements: Member Function Definition outside: template<typename T> return_type ClassName<T>::function() { }
diagrams.purpose: Understanding syntax for defining template class member functions outside the class body
